502 = Section 1115 Demonstration 
expansion eligible, Blind/Disabled 
504 = Section 1115 Demonstration 
expansion eligible, Children 
505 = Section 1115 Demonstration

Null/missing = source value is missing or unknown 
COMMENT: 
This variable has been retired and T-MSIS is using the eligibility group code (monthly 
ELGBLTY_GRP_CD_01–12) to designate information regarding eligibility. This variable 
(MASBOE_CD_01–12) is a sparsely reported by states.
